headline: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: Equinix, Archrock, Cheniere Energy in Focus
summary: Equinix, Archrock and Cheniere Energy lead Zacks' standout picks as volatility rocks markets, delivering strong gains despite a broad sell-off.
